description_long: This is a female adult figure dressed in formal business attire, featuring a fitted blazer with lapels and two buttons, a collared shirt underneath, and a knee-length skirt. The figure has a professional appearance, with a straight, shoulder-length bob hairstyle and a neutral facial expression. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the legs are straight, giving a clear view of the outfit's structure. The shoes are closed-toe and have a low heel, matching the formal style. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and subtle detailing in the clothing folds and seams. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure is designed to represent a typical urban pedestrian in a business context.
description: A professionally dressed adult woman in business attire with a blazer, skirt, collared shirt, and closed-toe shoes, standing upright with arms extended. She has a straight, shoulder-length bob hairstyle and a formal, urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blazer's lapels, collared shirt, skirt, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the blazer, skirt, and hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blazer, skirt, and the hairstyle's length.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the outfit and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with blazer, collared shirt, and knee-length skirt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
